overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The player descends from an elevated walkway, crosses a neon-lit plaza, passes through a dark tunnel with orange LED lights, and walks along a busy sidewalk under an overpass with heavy traffic and pedestrians carrying umbrellas.

events.description: beginning descent from elevated walkway down concrete stairs
transitioning from stairs to sloped ramp

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs and ramp from elevated walkway toward the plaza level below

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal edges descending from elevated walkway
transparent glass safety railing along the stair edge
water feature with bright blue neon lighting visible at the bottom of the descent
lit storefront with Japanese characters and blue neon trim

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an elevated walkway at night during heavy rain, descending concrete stairs toward a lower plaza. Blue neon lights from a fountain illuminate the destination while a convenience store glows to the right. The camera moves steadily downward, transitioning from stairs to a sloped ramp.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with convenience store

events.description: exiting covered stairwell into open plaza with wet reflective pavement
approaching dark tunnel entrance at the far end of the plaza

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet open plaza toward a tunnel entrance, passing pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person holding black umbrella walking across the wet plaza

entered.detail: wide open tiled area with rain puddles reflecting the surrounding lights
tall modern street light illuminating the plaza with warm yellow light
dark underpass entrance with ramp leading downward

segments.scene_description: Having reached the plaza level, the camera moves across the open wet pavement toward a dark tunnel entrance. A convenience store with bright signage stands to the right while pedestrians with umbrellas cross the area. The environment is exposed to the rain with reflective puddles covering the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark pedestrian underpass with orange LED lighting

events.description: entering dark tunnel from brightly lit plaza, visibility drops significantly
approaching tunnel exit with bright light visible at the far end

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit concrete tunnel with orange LED arrow panels on the walls

entered.detail: rough concrete walls of the underpass tunnel
illuminated orange LED panels with grid patterns lining the tunnel walls
low dark concrete ceiling of the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark, enclosed tunnel underpass with low visibility. Orange LED panels with arrow patterns line the concrete walls, providing the primary illumination. The space is narrow and sheltered from the rain, with a few pedestrians visible as silhouettes ahead. The tunnel exit glows brightly in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with dynamic neon billboards

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into covered walkway with vibrant neon billboard walls
futuristic vehicles driving past on the adjacent multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass alongside busy traffic, illuminated by shifting colored neon lights

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving past on the wet road with headlights glaring

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead
large curved wall with dynamic color-changing LED panels shifting between pink, blue, green and yellow
yellow and black striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from traffic
massive corporate building with large illuminated PETROCHEM logo on the facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass. The right wall features massive dynamic neon billboards cycling through vibrant colors, reflecting off the wet pavement. To the left, a busy road with futuristic traffic is separated by yellow barriers, while the large Petrochem building becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk with corporate building and heavy traffic

events.description: emerging from under overpass into more open area with clear view of Petrochem building

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk with the massive Petrochem building now dominating the left side view

entered.detail: break in the overpass revealing the night sky above
tall buildings with illuminated windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the wet sidewalk with the Petrochem building now looming large on the left. The overpass recedes into the distance, revealing more of the open sky and distant city lights. Heavy traffic continues to stream past on the left while the colorful neon wall remains visible to the right, though further away.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an elevated rainy walkway down into a neon-lit urban plaza and through a subterranean passage toward a towering corporate district. It begins by descending concrete stairs and a sloped ramp under heavy rain, moving from the heights toward a lower plaza illuminated by blue neon fountains and a glowing convenience store. As the camera crosses the reflective, puddle-covered pavement past pedestrians with umbrellas, the scene shifts into a dark, enclosed tunnel underpass lined with orange LED arrow panels. The environment then opens up as the camera exits the tunnel into a covered walkway beneath a massive highway overpass, where vibrant dynamic billboards reflect off the wet ground and futuristic traffic streams past yellow barriers. Finally, the camera continues along the sidewalk as the overpass recedes, leaving the colorful neon walls behind to reveal the looming Petrochem building and the distant lights of the city skyline.
